metadata.title: JustTalk - AI-Powered Language Learning
metadata.description: Practice speaking inside realistic scenarios with AI-enhanced personalities.

hero.headline: Build real speaking confidence in English
hero.subheadline: Practice English through realistic conversations with AI that remembers how you speak and builds every session on the last.

platform.title: Talking works—when it's tracked
platform.description: Most speaking tools let you talk but don't track real progress. JustTalk AI analyzes what you say and builds every session on your history—so improvement is cumulative, not random.

features.exploreMore: Explore more features in JustTalk AI

improvement.title: How improvement actually happens
improvement.description: One conversation doesn't change much. But when every session is tracked, understood, and used to shape the next one, progress compounds naturally.

personalities.title: Talk with different personalities
personalities.description: Some are supportive. Some challenge you. All help you practice real conversations

memory.title: They remember you
memory.description: Our AI personalities remember previous conversations, allowing you to pick up right where you left off.

scenarios.title: Practice speaking inside realistic scenarios
scenarios.description: Choose the situation, the role, and the difficulty—and build skill inside a consistent context.

roleplay.title: Ongoing roleplay with memory and personality
roleplay.description: Some scenarios unfold over multiple sessions. This isn't one-off roleplay. It's sustained speaking practice with continuity.

personalized.title: Personalized scenarios created for you
personalized.description: Teachers can design custom roleplay scenarios tailored to your goals, interests, and skill level—giving you practice that's uniquely relevant to what you need.

progress.title: Track your progress over time
progress.description: See how your speaking skills improve with detailed analytics and progress charts.

ielts.title: Preparing for IELTS Speaking?
ielts.description: Sit a realistic 12-minute mock Speaking test, then get a clear band estimate across all four official criteria—so you know exactly what's holding your score back.

feature.title: Prepare for IELTS Speaking
feature.description: Sit a full 12-minute mock test where an AI examiner walks you through all three parts—the Interview, the Long Turn cue card, and the Discussion—exactly like the real exam. The instant you finish, an AI coach scores every answer against the four official band criteria: Fluency & Coherence, Lexical Resource, Grammar, and Pronunciation. You get an estimated overall band, see precisely which criterion is holding you back, and receive targeted drills to practise before your next session.

tutors.title: When you're ready, JustTalk AI connects to real tutors
tutors.description: JustTalk AI is designed to integrate with live tutors. When you take lessons, tutors can build on your AI practice instead of starting from scratch.

liveTutoring.title: Live tutoring marketplace launching soon
liveTutoring.description: Connect with experienced tutors who understand your AI practice and can accelerate your progress with targeted guidance.

languageOnly.question: Is this only for English?
languageOnly.answer: Yes. We're currently focused on English to deliver the deepest possible speaking feedback.

notFor.question: Who is this not for?
notFor.answer1: If you're a beginner, or looking for grammar lessons, exercises, or passive study — this probably isn't the right fit.
notFor.answer2: JustTalk is built for people who want to learn by speaking.

prepare.question: Do I need to prepare anything before starting?
prepare.answer: No. You can start speaking immediately — no prompts, setup, or exercises.

lessonOrConversation.question: Is this a lesson or a conversation?
lessonOrConversation.answer1: It's a real conversation — guided and adaptive, not exercises or drills.
lessonOrConversation.answer2: There are no drills or scripted responses. The focus is on expressing ideas clearly and naturally.

grammar.question: Will it correct my grammar?
grammar.answer: Yes — without interrupting your flow. Most corrections appear after you speak, or during the conversation only when they genuinely help.

tutor.question: Do I need a tutor?
tutor.answer: No. JustTalk AI works completely on its own. Live tutors are optional.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time from your account.

privacy.question: Is my conversation data public or shared?
privacy.answer: No. Your conversations are private and used only to improve your experience in JustTalk.

voicePractice.title: Natural AI voice practice
voicePractice.description: Speak naturally with high-quality AI voices

feedback.title: Personalized feedback after every conversation
feedback.description: Get insights on your speaking patterns

unlimited.title: Unlimited conversations
unlimited.description: No daily limits on practice time

hero.headline: Learn with real tutors—without starting over
hero.subheadline: JustTalk connects live tutoring to your speaking history, so lessons begin with context—not re-diagnosis

seamless.title: Seamless experience with JustTalk for one-on-one learning

platformPage.exploreFeatures: Explore more features on JustTalk Tutors

speakWithTutor.title: Speak with a live tutor
speakWithTutor.description: Find a tutor matched to your personal needs and goals. Every tutor is supported by AI insights. Lessons stay personalized, efficient, and focused on your progress.

progressStays.title: Your progress stays with you
progressStays.description: On JustTalk, tutoring isn't tied to a single person.
progressStays.description2: Your speaking history carries forward, so lessons stay productive even if you change tutors.
progressStays.bullet2: No repeating the same early lessons
progressStays.bullet3: Freedom to choose tutors based on fit

speakingFirst.title: Focused, speaking-first lessons
speakingFirst.description: Tutoring on JustTalk is designed around real communication.
speakingFirst.bullet1: Lessons centered on speaking, not worksheets
speakingFirst.bullet2: Clear focus areas instead of generic conversation

trackProgress.title: Track your progress over time
trackProgress.description: See how your speaking skills improve with detailed analytics and progress charts.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Effortlessly track student progress, mistakes, and vocabulary—all in one place. Save time and let AI handle the details while you focus on what matters most.

personalization.title: True personalization
personalization.description: We track every word you say (and don't) to deliver a hyper-personalized roadmap to fluency.

cefr.title: CEFR-based progression
cefr.description: Our curriculum is built on CEFR—the global standard—so your progress is real, not just "points".

smarterTutoring.title: Smarter human tutoring
smarterTutoring.description: Every tutor is backed by real-time AI insights to focus each lesson on what matters most for you.

aiRemembers.title: AI that remembers you
aiRemembers.description: Our AI partner gives you unlimited speaking practice and remembers everything you've discussed with your tutor.

integration.title: Seamless integration
integration.description: AI and tutor work in sync. Everything you say improves your personalized path to fluency.

visualize.title: Visualize Progress
visualize.description: See all the data insights in simple diagrams

aiAssistant.title: AI assistant knows your students better
aiAssistant.description: Chat with AI to instantly access student interests, lesson summaries, and conversation history. Get personalized insights before every session to make lessons more relevant and engaging.

customScenarios.title: Create customized scenarios for your students
customScenarios.description: Build personalized AI agents tailored to each student's needs using simple prompts. Our comprehensive model extracts helpful insights and evaluates student interactions, giving you full control over the learning experience.

visualFlow.title: Build multi-step scenarios with visual flow
visualFlow.description: Transform simple prompts into complex learning journeys. Design multi-step conversation scenarios and visually connect AI agents to create structured practice paths that adapt to your students' progress.

teachOnline.title: Teach English online—on your terms
teachOnline.description: Set your rates, manage your availability, and teach speaking-focused lessons on a clean, modern platform.

friction.title: The hidden friction in traditional tutoring
friction.description: Your learning history doesn't travel with you—so every tutor session starts from scratch.

level.title: Every new tutor asks about your level
level.description: You waste valuable lesson time explaining what you already know instead of building new skills.

goals.title: You repeat your goals and weak points
goals.description: The context you've built with previous tutors doesn't transfer, so you're constantly reintroducing yourself.

warmups.title: Early lessons feel like warm-ups
warmups.description: Real progress only starts after they've figured out your needs—time you could have spent learning.

reset.title: Changing tutors resets your progress
reset.description: The new tutor has no visibility into what you've practiced, struggled with, or mastered—so the cycle repeats.

hero.headline: Why isn't your IELTS Speaking band moving?
hero.subheadline: One 12-minute mock test shows which of the four official Speaking criteria is holding your band back — before another retake costs you months of preparation.
hero.ctaNote: First mock test free · no card required

roles.title: Meet the Examiner. Then meet the Coach.
roles.description: One simulates the test. The other tells you what to do next. They never run at the same time — so you build real fluency, not coaching-dependent habits.
roles.examinerPitch: Practise the full IELTS Speaking flow in a realistic, timed session. The examiner guides you through all three parts without coaching you mid-test.
roles.p1Desc: Answer familiar-topic questions naturally and learn to extend without rambling.
roles.p2Desc: Receive a cue card, prepare for one minute, then speak for up to two minutes.
roles.p3Desc: Explain, compare, justify opinions, and speculate about broader issues.
roles.examinerCallout: No interruptions while you speak. Feedback comes after your answer, so you build real fluency — not stop-start habits.
roles.coachPitch: When the test ends, switch to Coach mode for clear, criteria-based feedback on what you actually did — and what to work on next.
roles.aDesc: See your performance across Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, and Pronunciation.
roles.bDesc: Spots the words you overuse, the structures you avoid, and what to swap them for.
roles.cDesc: Practise the next skill you need: chunking, paraphrasing, Part 3 opinion-building.

feedback.title: From vague advice to useful next steps.
feedback.description: Generic feedback tells you what's wrong. JustTalk tells you what to practise next — with the exact sentence patterns to drill.
feedback.ex1Vague: Try to use more advanced vocabulary.
feedback.ex1Good: Swap "very big" for "enormous" or "vast" — you used "very" seven times in Part 2.
feedback.ex2Good: Cut the long pause before answers — open with "That's an interesting question…" to keep the flow.
feedback.ex3Good: You avoided conditionals in Part 3. Practise "If… I would…" to show the range the rubric rewards.

routine.title: A 15-minute session you can repeat every day.
routine.description: One mock-test Part a day. Real exam structure, AI-graded, with a coach who reviews your transcript and works the weak spots with you.
routine.step1Title: Sit one Part with the AI examiner
routine.step1Desc: Same timing, same question format, same pressure — a faithful slice of the real test.
routine.step2Title: Coach reviews your score and transcript
routine.step2Desc: Walks through what worked, what didn't, and how to lift your band next session.
routine.step3Desc: Drill the areas the coach flagged — low-stakes reps that build the habit without test-day nerves.
routine.totalNote: Repeat for four weeks before your test.

compare.title: Why not just use ChatGPT, a tutor, or YouTube?
compare.description: Fair question. Here's the honest comparison.
compare.freeCon1: No feedback on your speaking — only explanations or generic praise.
compare.freeCon2: No criteria-based scoring, no timed mock, no measure of progress.
compare.jtPro1: Criteria-based scoring on all four official Speaking criteria.
compare.jtPro2: Daily practice. Cheaper than one tutor hour, less than one retake fee.
compare.jtCon: Newer than 1:1 tutoring — strongest when paired with occasional tutor reviews.
compare.tutorPro: Personal, expert, accountable — the best option if you can afford daily sessions.
compare.tutorCon1: One hour a week isn't enough reps. Speaking is a habit.
compare.tutorCon2: No practice between lessons — you forget the feedback by midweek.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is this an official IELTS test?
faq.a1: No. JustTalk provides IELTS-style practice with unofficial band estimates. It supports — it does not replace — certified IELTS assessment.
faq.q2: How accurate is the band estimate?
faq.a2: Estimates are based on the four public Speaking criteria and are meant to guide your practice, not predict your exact official score.
faq.q3: Do I need to prepare anything to start?
faq.a3: No. Start a mock test immediately — the examiner guides you through every part.
faq.q4: How long does a full mock take?
faq.a4: About 12 minutes for the full Parts 1–3 flow, plus a few minutes of coach feedback afterwards.
faq.q5: Can I use this alongside a tutor?
faq.a5: Yes — that's the ideal setup. Daily AI practice between lessons, with a tutor reviewing your progress.

cta.badge: First mock test free · no card required
cta.title: Find out what's holding back your band — in 12 minutes.
cta.description: One IELTS-style mock test. One clear report. You see your estimated band, the criterion holding you back, and exactly what to drill next.

ieltsPage.disclaimer: JustTalk provides IELTS-style practice and AI-generated feedback with unofficial band estimates. It is not affiliated with IELTS, does not award official scores, and is designed to supplement — not replace — certified IELTS assessment. IELTS is a registered trademark of its respective owners.
